de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

Class QueueRuleApplicationManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.QueueRuleApplicationManager
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    NewRuleListener, AutomatedRuleApplicationManager

    public class QueueRuleApplicationManager
extends Object
implements AutomatedRuleApplicationManager
    Implementation of AutomatedRuleApplicationManager that stores possible RuleApps in a priority queue. The element with highest priority in the queue can be obtained via next(). This operation will remove the element from the queue. The priority of a given RuleApp corresponds to its RuleAppCost. A RuleApp can be equipped with a RuleAppCost by converting it into a RuleAppContainer. The cost of a RuleApp is computed according to a given Strategy (see Feature.computeCost(RuleApp, PosInOccurrence, Goal)).

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Goal goal
      The goal this manager belongs to.
      private RuleApp nextRuleApp
      The next automatic RuleApp determined by the strategy.
      private long nextRuleTime 
      private RuleAppContainer previousMinimum
      The minimum RuleAppContainer from a previous round.
      private ImmutableHeap<RuleAppContainer> queue
      Priority queue containing all RuleAppContainers that are candidates for application on a Goal.

    • Field Detail

      • goal

        private Goal goal
        The goal this manager belongs to.

      • queue

        private ImmutableHeap<RuleAppContainer> queue
        Priority queue containing all RuleAppContainers that are candidates for application on a Goal.

      • previousMinimum

        private RuleAppContainer previousMinimum
        The minimum RuleAppContainer from a previous round. It is taken out of queue temporarily and is put back in during the next round. After all, the corresponding rule still needs to be taken into consideration for future rule applications.

      • nextRuleApp

        private RuleApp nextRuleApp
        The next automatic RuleApp determined by the strategy. Aka result of methods next() and peekNext().

      • nextRuleTime

        private long nextRuleTime

      • push

        private ImmutableHeap<RuleAppContainer> push(RuleAppContainer c,
                                   ImmutableHeap<RuleAppContainer> sourceQueue)
        Add a new rule app to the heap, provided that the rule app is not infinitely expensive

      • peekNext

        public RuleApp peekNext()
        Specified by:
        peekNext in interface AutomatedRuleApplicationManager
        Returns:
        the first applicable rule app, i.e. the least expensive element of the heap that is not obsolete and caches the result of this operation to save some time the next time the method nextAndCache() or next() is called. A call of next() empties the cache again.

      • next

        public RuleApp next()
        Specified by:
        next in interface AutomatedRuleApplicationManager
        Returns:
        the first applicable rule app, i.e. the least expensive element of the heap that is not obsolete

      • clearNextRuleApp

        private void clearNextRuleApp()

      • computeNextRuleApp

        private void computeNextRuleApp(ImmutableHeap<RuleAppContainer> furtherAppsQueue)
        Helper method for peekNext(). Searches for the next rule application, at which the iteration includes all rule app containers that are contained either in primary or secondary queue.

      • copy

        public AutomatedRuleApplicationManager copy()
        Specified by:
        copy in interface AutomatedRuleApplicationManager
